channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Prep roundup: Benicia opens league play with key baseball win over Acalanes
item.description: Serra wins tight game against St. Ignatius. College Park staves off Campolindo. Castro Valley softball routes James Logan.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: New Mexico HS baseball player charged, team suspended amid allegations teen urinated in opponents' water jug
item.description: A New Mexico high school baseball player was charged for allegedly urinating in the water jug of an opposing team. The alleged incident occurred last month.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How Declan Rice defied Arsenal's set-piece coach to score sensational free kicks
item.description: As Arsenal's set-piece coach, Nicolas Jover has been the mastermind behind the team's uptick in goals from dead-ball situations. It seems like he cannot take any credit for Declan Rice's two amazing free kicks against Real Madrid.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Utah scores season-high 7 goals in win over Seattle
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Whether or not they make the NHL playoffs, the Utah Hockey Club is out to finish the season with a bang.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Timberwolves watch their playoff position tumble after blowing huge lead in 4th quarter
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Regular-season defeats don’t get much more brutal than the one the Minnesota Timberwolves suffered Tuesday. The wide-open nature of the Western Conference playoff race doesn’t give them much time to stew over what went wrong.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: College athletes and San Diego students with disabilities team up for day of sports
item.description: The Inclusive Sports Foundation has provided children with special needs the opportunity to play sports with college athletes and recently stopped by the University of San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Julian Del Gaudio, Fox 5

item.title: Canucks make NHL history with 3 goals in last minute of regulation, beat Stars 6-5 in OT
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Kiefer Sherwood set an NHL record three weeks ago by accumulating the most hits in a season. He helped the Vancouver Cancuks made history on Tuesday night with a big comeback in the final minute of regulation.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fans impressed with new Bees Ballpark
item.description: SOUTH JORDAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Welcome to The Ballpark. The state of Utah has not had a brand new stadium since 2008 when Real Salt Lake opened Rio Tinto Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: With top seed in East secured, Atkinson wants to get some of Cavaliers' top players some rest
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Kenny Atkinson thought during training camp that realistic goals for the Cleveland Cavaliers would be 50 wins and a top-three seed in the Eastern Conference. The Cavaliers surpassed those goals awhile ago to the point where Atkinson is planning for a possible championship run.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Swanson hits tiebreaking single in 4-run eighth as the Cubs beat the Rangers 10-6
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Dansby Swanson lined a tiebreaking two-run single in Chicago's four-run eighth inning, and the Cubs beat the Texas Rangers 10-6 on Tuesday on another frigid night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Caitlin Clark denies claims she talks trash in WNBA, admits she'll only do it in self-defense
item.description: Amid multiple claims that Caitlin Clark talks trash to opponents, the phenom set the record straight in an interview with David Letterman on Netflix.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kane misses, Frattesi scores as Inter beats Bayern 2-1 in 1st leg of Champions League quarterfinals
item.description: MUNICH (AP) — Inter Milan’s treble chances are still very much on after it won 2-1 at Bayern Munich in the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinals Tuesday to inflict the German team's first home defeat in the competition in almost exactly four years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers World Series champion stays at 'brown house' over Trump visit with teammates
item.description: Brusdar Graterol was absent from the Los Angeles Dodgers' White House celebration on Monday, and while the reason isn't known, his cryptic post may have given a hint.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Maine lawmakers send letter to Trump condemning Gov Janet Mills over trans athletes in girls' sports policies
item.description: A letter signed by 14 Maine state senators condemning Gov. Janet Mills was sent to the White House amid an ongoing battle over trans athlete policies.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Egor Demin leaves BYU for NBA Draft
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU standout point guard Egor Demin has decided to leave BYU after one season and declare for the NBA Draft. Demin made the announcement at a press conference held at the school Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Houston on the wrong side of gritty and ugly finish against Florida in national title game
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — This ending was gritty and ugly, just the way Houston usually likes games. Except it was Florida forcing bad shots and turnovers against the Cougars to finish off the national championship game Monday night.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vikings wide receiver Justin Jefferson hosts Youth Football Camp
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI/KSWB) - The NFL offseason is a time for players to train and gear up for the upcoming year, and for the best wide receiver in the league, that training program this offseason consists of being chased around by 300+ kids in San Diego for a day.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: The 2024 World Series Champions, the Los Angeles Dodgers, were honored by President Donald Trump at the White House on Monday before opening a series with the Washington Nationals.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Monarchs suffer first loss of the season in 2-1 battle with Ventura County
item.description: Real Monarchs battled back from a two-goal deficit, pushed late, and nearly snatched a draw from the jaws of defeat for a second straight match - but ultimately fell 2-1.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Mikheyev, Nazar and Knight lead the Blackhawks to a 3-1 win over the Penguins
item.description: Ilya Mikheyev scored twice, Frank Nazar added a goal and Spencer Knight stopped 28 shots as the Chicago Blackhawks snapped a five-game skid with a 3-1 win over the Pittsburgh Penguins on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Houston, Florida play for title and put a different spin on the underdog role to wrap March Madness
item.description: Coach Kelvin Sampson’s squad of defenders and deniers face Florida for the national title Monday night. They wrap up a front-runner’s Final Four that featured all No. 1 seeds but ends with the two top ones — Auburn and Duke — sitting at home.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: UConn is back on top of women’s basketball, winning its 12th national championship by routing defending champion South Carolina 82-59 on Sunday behind Azzi Fudd’s 24 points.
item.dc:creator: Dough Feinberg, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaks Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record by scoring his 895th
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin has broken Wayne Gretzky’s record for the most goals in NHL history by scoring the 895th of his career. The Washington Capitals’ captain made history Sunday against the New York Islanders by beating fellow Russian Ilya Sorokin on a power play in the second period.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Duke's push for 6th NCAA title falls apart in unlikely late collapse against Houston in Final Four
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Up by double figures in the second half at the Final Four, closing in on the chance to play for yet another national championship, Duke was right where it had worked all season to be. What happened next was unforgettable, history of the most painful kind.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Clayton leads Florida to NCAA title game, scoring 34 points in 79-73 victory over SEC rival Auburn
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Walter Clayton Jr. is having an NCAA Tournament for the ages. Florida now just needs him to deliver one more time.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Capitals beat Blackhawks 5-3, Ovechkin scores two goals to tie Gretzky
item.description: Alex Ovechkin tied Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record by scoring the 893rd and 894th of his career, the second being the game winner, as the Washington Capitals rallied to beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trevor Lewis excited to be back in Utah for NHL game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah native Trevor Lewis has played a few preseason games in Salt Lake City, but never a regular season game. So as he returns to his home state to play against the Utah Hockey Club with the Los Angeles Kings tonight, he couldn't be more excited.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fencer refuses to compete against transgender opponent
item.description: Turner told NewsNation she didn’t “want to let people know that I'm OK with this and pretend like nothing's happening.
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation

item.title: Cubs home opener: Some things to know for fans heading to Wrigley Field on Friday
item.description: CHICAGO — For fans attending Wrigley Field for the Cubs homer opener Friday afternoon, there are some numbers to keep in mind. The Wrigley Field fan text messaging service is available in the ballpark to report issues in the park without leaving your seat at the game.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utes ready to rock the Regionals
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah gymnastics team is the only program in the nation that has qualified for all 48 NCAA National Championship gymnastics meets.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Teaching Chicago's hard-working values, basketball legend Tom Kleinschmidt builds a dynasty at DePaul Prep
item.description: DePaul College Prep's boys' basketball team, coached by Tom Kleinschmidt, has won three consecutive IHSA championships, thanks to his hard work, discipline, and respect, which he learned growing up on the city's Northwest Side.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lowe, WGN 9

item.title: Baseball: Granite Hills 4, San Marcos 4
item.description: SAN MARCOS(KUSI)- Spring break baseball at the yard on Tuesday afternoon in the North County with this one ending in a 4-4 tie.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5
